---
title: "Welcome Quest: What IS Computer Science?"
subtitle: "Discover the Adventure of Problem Solving, Creativity & Innovation"
format:
  live-html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.quest-badge}
🌟 WELCOME QUEST | Difficulty: Beginner | Time: 3 minutes
:::

::: {.hero}
# 🗺️ Welcome, Adventurer!

Before you begin your coding journey, let's discover what Computer Science really is—and why it might be the perfect adventure for you.
:::

## 🤔 What is Computer Science?

Computer Science is **much more than just coding**. It's the art and science of:

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-info}
✨ **Problem Solving** - Breaking down complex challenges into solvable steps  
🎨 **Creativity** - Designing elegant solutions and building new things  
🤝 **Collaboration** - Working in teams to create something bigger  
🚀 **Innovation** - Shaping the future with technology  
💡 **Logical Thinking** - Understanding patterns and systems  
:::

## 🎮 CS in Action: Real-World Examples

Computer Scientists create the technology you use every day:

<div class="quest-grid">

::: {.quest-card}
### 🎵 Music Recommendations
Ever wonder how Spotify knows what you'll love? That's **machine learning algorithms** analyzing patterns in millions of songs!
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🗺️ Navigation Systems
Google Maps finding the fastest route through thousands of streets? That's **graph algorithms** and **optimization** at work!
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🎮 Video Games
From realistic physics to intelligent NPCs, games use **3D graphics**, **AI**, and **real-time systems**!
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🏥 Medical Imaging
CT scans and MRIs use **image processing algorithms** to help doctors see inside the human body!
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🌍 Climate Modeling
Scientists use **supercomputers** and **simulations** to predict weather and understand climate change!
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🎨 Social Media Filters
Those fun Snapchat and Instagram filters? That's **computer vision** and **augmented reality**!
:::

</div>

## 🎯 What Computer Scientists Actually Do

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-success}
**You don't have to code all day!** Computer Scientists:

- 🧠 **Design** solutions to important problems
- 🔍 **Analyze** data to find insights
- 🎨 **Create** apps, games, and tools
- 🤝 **Collaborate** with experts in other fields
- 🔬 **Research** new technologies
- 📊 **Optimize** systems to work faster and better
- 🎓 **Teach** and mentor others
:::

## 💭 The CS Mindset

Computer Science teaches you to think like a problem solver:

1. **Break it down** - Turn big problems into smaller steps
2. **Find patterns** - Recognize what you've seen before
3. **Think creatively** - Design elegant solutions
4. **Test and iterate** - Learn from what works and what doesn't
5. **Never stop learning** - Technology always evolves

::: {.tip-box}
**💡 Did You Know?**

Computer Science combines with **everything**:

- Biology + CS = Bioinformatics (DNA sequencing, drug discovery)
- Art + CS = Digital Media (animation, game design)
- Business + CS = Data Analytics (market trends, optimization)
- Music + CS = Audio Engineering (sound synthesis, effects)
- Psychology + CS = Human-Computer Interaction (UX design)
:::

## 🚀 Your CS Adventure Starts Here

Computer Science isn't just a field—it's a way of thinking that opens doors to **every industry**. Whether you want to:

- 🎮 Build the next hit game
- 🌍 Solve global challenges
- 💰 Start your own tech company
- 🏥 Improve healthcare
- 🎨 Create digital art
- 📱 Design the apps everyone uses

...Computer Science gives you the tools to make it happen!

::: {.quest-complete}
### ✨ Welcome Quest Complete!

You've discovered what Computer Science really is. Ready to see how it appears in your daily life?

**Next Quest:** [CS in Your Daily Life →](00-cs-daily-life.qmd)
:::

---

::: {.tip-box}
**🎓 Want to learn more?**

Visit the Allegheny College Department of Computer and Information Science:  
🌐 [https://cs.allegheny.edu](https://cs.allegheny.edu)
:::
